name: [WE COAT] IMAGE MONSTER: Commercial Roofs DALLE SOCIALS

mapper.prompt: CAMERA POSITION: 50 feet above the roof, angled downward at 45 degrees to fully capture the roof as the primary subject of the image. IMAGE STYLE: [{{27.`1`}}: {{27.`2`}}]. SUBJECT: A [{{28.`1`}}: {{28.`2`}}]. SUBJECT CONDITION: The building and roof are in well-maintained condition, with clean, intact surfaces. LOCATION: [{{29.`1`}}: {{29.`2`}}]. LIGHTING: Mid-day sun, under clear skies or light clouds, minimal shadows. FRAME: Include the front of the building in the frame along with the surrounding environment, such as parking areas, trees, or other contextual details, but keep them secondary to the roof. SEASON: The season is (fall/summer/spring), with visible ground-level activity, including numerous vehicles and people appropriate to the setting.  --ar 16:9 --no signage, text, branding, logos, billboards, words, names, letters
